paraphrase_note: The article is authored by Barry J. Babin, Christine Gonzalez, and Christina Watts; it studies how gift-shopping orientations shape gift shopping value and satisfaction.

locator: Journal of Retailing 79(2), DOI metadata and author-uploaded abstract
paraphrase_note: The article develops six hedonic shopping motivation dimensions and reports a positive relationship between hedonic motivations and browsing behavior.
